title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: Location permission denial during onboarding does not properly return user to Organized screen and breaks Find My Device flow in Poly Lens menu
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the license agreement and privacy policy.
3. On the "Organized" screen, when the location permission pop-up appears, tap "Deny".
4. Observe that the user returns to the "Organized" screen and the location permission step is skipped.
5. Navigate to Poly Lens menu or the device home screen.
7. Observe the prompt stating that the app collects location data to enable Find My Device even when the app is closed.
9. When the system location permission prompt appears, tap "Deny".
10. Observe that the Find My Device window remains open with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
11. Tap "Enable Now" and when the system location permission prompt appears, tap "Allow".
12. Observe that the user can see devices on a geo map and access Find My Device functionality.
expected: 1. After denying location permission on the "Organized" screen, the user returns to the "Organized" screen and skips that step. 2. When accessing Find My Device, a prompt explains that location data is collected. 3. If location permission is denied from Find My Device, the window stays open with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options. 4. If location permission is allowed, the user sees devices on a geo map and can use Find My Device.
